sections.paragraph:
(i.q. עָמְרִיָּה prob. “servant of Jehovah;” compare the root No.3 [“perhaps ‘young learner of Jehovah’; comp. the Arab. عَمْرُ unskilful”]), [Omri], pr.n.-

(1) of a king of Israel (929-18, b.c.); the founder of Samaria, 1Ki 16:16, seq.; 2Ki 8:26 Mic 6:16 LXX. Ἄμβρι.-(2) 1Ch 7:8.-(3) 1Ch 9:4.-(4) 1Ch 27:18.
